# netbox_vlan_group (Resource)

Manages a NetBox VLAN group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the VLAN group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the VLAN group.
- `max_vid` (Number) Maximum VLAN ID in the group.
- `min_vid` (Number) Minimum VLAN ID in the group.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug for the VLAN group. Auto-generated from name if not provided.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this VLAN group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing VLAN group with matching name instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
